text: User: thus far the archeologist is only able to inject content from claude code conversations -- I also want it to support injecting nostr conversations generated in the ~/Work/TENEX-ff... approach, with clear attributions since they are nostr kind:1 notes -- or perhaps the simpler solution would be to simply use whatever database is already available in the backend like ~/.tenex/projects ? [...] Add a `--source tenex` flag (or `tenex` subcommand) to `archeologist` that:
